rules.missingDictSubject: Dictionary RULE_SUBJECT not found. Add it under Data dictionary.
rules.missingDictDocType: Dictionary RULE_DOC_TYPE not found. Add it under Data dictionary.
rules.missingDictEngSubjectDoc: Dictionary RULE_ENG_SUBJECT_DOC not found. Add it under Data dictionary.
settings.dictDeleteConfirm: Delete this dictionary and all its items?
settings.dictCodeEditHint: Changing the code may break existing references.
settings.dictItemDeleteConfirm: Delete this item? (Items with children cannot be deleted.)
settings.ocrDescription: Extract text from documents or images. Connect a compatible HTTP OCR endpoint.
settings.ocrConfigHint: When enabled, workflows can call this HTTP endpoint for text extraction.
settings.ocrErrorUrl: Enter a valid URL starting with http or https.
settings.ocrNoWorkspace: No active workspace found in your token, please log in again.
settings.ocrDetailNoneCredentials: Auth type is NONE — no credentials.
settings.ocrDetailCustomAuthHint: This auth type is not NONE / BASIC / API_KEY. Use Edit to manage credentials.
settings.ocrImportRemark: Migrated from browser local OCR settings
settings.ocrToolsOcrTypeRequired: Please select an OCR engine type
settings.ocrParamsEnginePlaceholder: Select a supported OCR engine (e.g. Paddle, MinerU) before editing extended parameters.
settings.ocrPaddle.fileTypeHint: 0 = PDF, 1 = image. If omitted, the server infers from the URL.
settings.ocrPaddle.useDocOrientationClas: Correct 0°/90°/180°/270° skewed document images when enabled.
settings.ocrPaddle.useDocUnwarpingHint: Correct warped pages (creases, tilt, etc.) when enabled.
settings.ocrPaddle.useLayoutDetectionHin: Detect and order layout regions when enabled.
settings.ocrPaddle.useChartRecognitionHi: Parse charts (bar, pie, etc.) into tables when enabled.
settings.ocrPaddle.layoutThresholdHint: Model score threshold in [0, 1]. Default ~0.5 from the pipeline if unset. Use a number or JSON per API docs.
settings.ocrPaddle.layoutNmsHint: Remove duplicate or highly overlapping layout boxes when enabled.
settings.ocrPaddle.layoutUnclipRatioHint: Expansion factor > 0. Default 1.0 from the pipeline if unset. Number or JSON array/object.
settings.ocrPaddle.layoutMergeBboxesMode: large | small | union (default large). Or a JSON object. Plain text large/small/union is accepted.
settings.ocrPaddle.promptLabelHint: VL prompt type; only applies when useLayoutDetection is false.
settings.ocrPaddle.repetitionPenaltyHint: Increase if output repeats text or tables.
settings.ocrPaddle.temperatureHint: Lower if unstable or hallucinations; slightly higher if missing text or too much repeat.
settings.ocrPaddle.topPHint: Lower for more conservative, focused outputs.
settings.ocrPaddle.minPixelsHint: Raise if the input image is small and text is unclear; often leave default.
settings.ocrPaddle.maxPixelsHint: Lower if images are very large and speed or VRAM is an issue.
settings.ocrPaddle.showFormulaNumberHint: Include equation numbers in exported Markdown.
settings.ocrPaddle.visualizeHint: Return vis maps and intermediates (slower). true/false; omit follows Serving.visualize; if unset everywhere, images are returned by default.
settings.ocrMineru.isOcrHint: Whether OCR is enabled (default false). Applies to pipeline/VLM models only; leave unset for server defaults.
settings.ocrMineru.enableFormulaHint: Recognize formulas (default true). Applies to pipeline/VLM; for VLM, mainly affects inline formula parsing.
settings.ocrMineru.enableTableHint: Recognize tables (default true); pipeline/VLM models only.
settings.ocrMineru.languageHint: Locale code (default ch). See MinerU docs for allowed values; pipeline/VLM only.
settings.ocrMineru.dataIdHint: Opaque ID up to 128 chars: letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot.
settings.ocrMineru.dataIdPattern: Allowed: letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot only.
settings.ocrMineru.callbackHint: HTTPS/HTTP POST for async results (optional). If omitted, poll task status. Payload uses checksum/content; see MinerU docs.
settings.ocrMineru.seedHint: Letters, digits, underscore; max 64. Required when callback is set.
settings.ocrMineru.seedRequired: Provide seed when callback URL is set.
settings.ocrMineru.extraFormatsHint: Markdown/JSON always included; optionally add docx, html and/or latex. Not used for HTML source files.
settings.ocrMineru.modelVersionHint: pipeline | vlm | MinerU-HTML (choose MinerU-HTML for HTML sources). Defaults to pipeline.
settings.ocrMineru.noCacheHint: If true, skip cached URL snapshots; default false / server default.
settings.ocrMineru.cacheToleranceHint: Seconds until URL snapshot is stale (default 900) when caching is enabled.

home.subtitle: You are signed in to your workspace. Add features here as needed.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to open your workspace.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account. A default tenant and workspace are provisioned for you.
auth.goLogin: Already have an account? Log in
settings.modelProvidersReadOnly: Not allowed: only workspace owner/admin can modify.
settings.modelProvidersReadOnlyHint: You are a read-only member: you can view settings but not create, edit, or delete records.
settings.modelProvidersTokenMissingRole: Your access token is missing the workspace role claim (wrole). Sign in again to enable admin write actions in the UI.
settings.modelProvidersFieldProviderPh: Select a provider from the dictionary (stored by name)
settings.modelProvidersFieldModelTypePh: Select a model type from the dictionary (stored by name)
settings.modelProvidersFieldConfigPh: Optional. If provided, must be valid JSON.
settings.modelProvidersFieldConfigJsonIn: Invalid JSON. Check brackets, quotes, and commas.
settings.modelProvidersSecretKeepHint: Leave empty to keep the existing secret on the server.
settings.modelProvidersPasswordPlacehold: Leave empty to keep; enter a value to update
settings.modelProvidersApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep; enter a value to update
settings.modelProvidersNoneAuthHint: Auth type NONE: no credentials required.
